race.comment: ZAIBATSU (7) did his best work late and finished a close-up fourth over 900m at Wellington. Beautifully placed now and ready to win. NEBIDA (4) returns from a spell of nine months and did win first-up last time in work over 1000m at Wellington. Best fresh figures put her right in this. ULTRA WHITE (12) has been in the market at her last couple of runs but failed to threaten, the latest effort a modest fifth at Lightning Ridge over 1200m. Place preferred from the draw. RUSSIAN EMBER (1) returned to form with a tough third over 1000m at Warren. Finds a nice race and can secure another top-three finish. SEENI (3) returned to form with a slick win from off the speed over 1000m at Wellington. Look for him late.
